name: @pi-gui/oh-my-pi-rpc-client
description: ACP-free transport for the oh-my-pi coding agent. Spawns the compiled omp binary in --mode rpc and adapts its native NDJSON JSON-RPC stream to a SessionDriver-shaped API. Sibling of @pi-gui/oh-my-pi-acp-client — mirrors its public shape so it can be swapped in without renderer changes.
